title: boronia hispida
intro: Boronia hispida, also known as the prickly boronia, is a flowering plant native to Australia. It is a member of the citrus family and is prized for its fragrant flowers and leaves, which have been used in traditional medicine for their medicinal properties, including antiseptic and anti-inflammatory properties. The plant is used to treat a range of health issues, including skin conditions, wounds, and respiratory problems, due to its antiseptic and expectorant properties. Boronia hispida can be prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, making it a versatile and valuable addition to natural health remedies.
